title: Tagine with Radish and Algerian Flair
description: A flavorful North African-inspired stew made with tender radish and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the silky in a large clay or ceramic pot over medium heat.
Add the Algerian and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the radish and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5-7 minutes until tender.
Add the water, salt, and tagine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-15 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Algerian if desired.
